ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the employee */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the employee */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the employee */,
  "started_on" TEXT /* Date the employee started working */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the employee */,
  "address" TEXT /* Home address of the employee */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the employee */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the employee */,
  "ssn" TEXT /* Social Security Number (or equivalent identifier) of the employee */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the employee is currently active */,
  "hired_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who hired the employee */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was terminated (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_job_title FOREIGN KEY ("job_title") REFERENCES job_titles ("job_title"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_hired_by FOREIGN KEY ("hired_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_titles" (
  "job_title_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job title */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Name of the job title */,
  "job_description" TEXT /* Description of the job title */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department associated with the job title */,
  "salary_range_min" INTEGER /* Minimum salary range for the job title */,
  "salary_range_max" INTEGER /* Maximum salary range for the job title */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the job title is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_title_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_titles_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager for the department */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the department */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the department is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_departments" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the employee belongs to */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the employee started in the department */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the employee left the department (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id", "department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_job_history" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "job_title_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job title */,
  "started_on" TEXT /* Date the employee started the job */,
  "ended_on" TEXT /* Date the employee ended the job */,
  "reason_for_change" TEXT /* Reason for the job change (e.g., promotion, lateral move) */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the job is the current job of the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id", "job_title_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_education" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "degree" TEXT /* Degree earned */,
  "field_of_study" TEXT /* Field of study */,
  "graduation_date" TEXT /* Date of graduation */,
  "degree_type" TEXT /* Type of degree (e.g., Bachelor's, Master's) */,
  "gpa" REAL /* Grade Point Average (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id", "school_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_training" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "training_program" TEXT /* Name of the training program */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date the training was completed */,
  "training_type" TEXT /* Type of training (e.g., online, in-person) */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Name of the instructor */,
  "cost" INTEGER /* Cost of the training program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id", "training_program")
)

CREATE TABLE "benefits" (
  "benefit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benefit */,
  "benefit_name" TEXT /* Name of the benefit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the benefit */,
  "cost" INTEGER /* Cost of the benefit */,
  "coverage_start_date" TEXT /* Date the benefit coverage starts */,
  "coverage_end_date" TEXT /* Date the benefit coverage ends */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the benefit is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benefit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_benefits" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "benefit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the benefit the employee is enrolled in */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the employee enrolled in the benefit */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date the employee terminated the benefit (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id", "benefit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date of the evaluation */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given (1-5) */,
  "evaluator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who conducted the evaluation */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or feedback from the evaluation */,
  "is_final" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the evaluation is final */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_evaluations_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_evaluations_evaluator_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., HR administrator, manager, employee) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user account is active */,
  "created_on" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
